embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

footer.text: Top voted spot wins every Sunday · 00:00 UTC

fields.value: *No description provided.*
fields.name: 📝 Description

details.note: message was not in cache — only fields in raw_data available

fields.value:
Submit your own drop spot for a chance to win:
1️⃣ Head to https://discord.com/channels/988564962802810961/1508030522746605690
2️⃣ Run `/addvoting` and fill in spot name + description
3️⃣ DM the bot an image of your spot (or skip)
• **1 submission** per person per week
fields.name: 📝 Want your own spot in the running?

fields.value:
• Vote for up to **2 spots** per week (click ▲ on cards)
• Click ▲ again on a spot to remove your vote
• Every **Sunday at 00:00 UTC**, the top-voted spot wins
• The winner gets made into a **FREE map** for everyone who voted for it 🚀
fields.name: 🏆 How voting works

👤 *Submitted by .zeptorb.*

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s
